{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01V8tEMoTKeXcUJrG2dGZvm7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","name":"Agent","input":{"subagent_type":"feature-dev:code-reviewer","description":"Code review round 10","prompt":"Perform a thorough code review of the Bookmate application in /root/Projects/bookmate/app.\n\nThis is a Next.js 15 App Router application with:\n- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4\n- SQLite via better-sqlite3\n- iron-session for auth\n- API routes in app/api/\n\n9 previous rounds of code review have been done, covering:\n- Security (timing-safe secrets, XSS, input validation, SQL injection, webhook auth)\n- Race conditions (stale data in transactions, concurrent writes)\n- Client-side bugs (date handling, error boundaries, ARIA)\n- Auth bypass, HTML injection in emails, type validation\n\nFocus on areas NOT covered in previous rounds:\n1. **Memory leaks** — unclosed database connections, event listeners not cleaned up\n2. **Performance** — N+1 queries, missing DB indexes, unnecessary re-renders\n3. **Data integrity** — orphaned records when deleting, foreign key enforcement\n4. **Edge cases** — empty states, boundary conditions, Unicode handling\n5. **API consistency** — response format inconsistencies, HTTP status codes\n6. **Error recovery** — what happens when external APIs (Open Library) are down\n7. **Session/cookie edge cases** — expired sessions, cookie size limits\n\nRead through the key files in:\n- app/lib/ (db.ts, session.ts, notifications.ts, crypto-utils.ts)\n- app/app/api/ (all route handlers)\n- app/app/ (page components)\n- app/components/\n\nReport only HIGH-CONFIDENCE issues that are genuine bugs or significant problems. For each issue, provide:\n- Severity (Critical/High/Medium)\n- File and line number\n- What the bug/issue is\n- What the fix should be\n\nSkip cosmetic/style issues. Skip anything that was likely fixed in previous rounds."},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":236,"cache_read_input_tokens":35550,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":236},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"d7f2086b-9e2b-43fb-9947-249a8e8915c9"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_started","task_id":"af032ea10c8e1c9f9","tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","description":"Code review round 10","task_type":"local_agent","prompt":"Perform a thorough code review of the Bookmate application in /root/Projects/bookmate/app.\n\nThis is a Next.js 15 App Router application with:\n- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4\n- SQLite via better-sqlite3\n- iron-session for auth\n- API routes in app/api/\n\n9 previous rounds of code review have been done, covering:\n- Security (timing-safe secrets, XSS, input validation, SQL injection, webhook auth)\n- Race conditions (stale data in transactions, concurrent writes)\n- Client-side bugs (date handling, error boundaries, ARIA)\n- Auth bypass, HTML injection in emails, type validation\n\nFocus on areas NOT covered in previous rounds:\n1. **Memory leaks** — unclosed database connections, event listeners not cleaned up\n2. **Performance** — N+1 queries, missing DB indexes, unnecessary re-renders\n3. **Data integrity** — orphaned records when deleting, foreign key enforcement\n4. **Edge cases** — empty states, boundary conditions, Unicode handling\n5. **API consistency** — response format inconsistencies, HTTP status codes\n6. **Error recovery** — what happens when external APIs (Open Library) are down\n7. **Session/cookie edge cases** — expired sessions, cookie size limits\n\nRead through the key files in:\n- app/lib/ (db.ts, session.ts, notifications.ts, crypto-utils.ts)\n- app/app/api/ (all route handlers)\n- app/app/ (page components)\n- app/components/\n\nReport only HIGH-CONFIDENCE issues that are genuine bugs or significant problems. For each issue, provide:\n- Severity (Critical/High/Medium)\n- File and line number\n- What the bug/issue is\n- What the fix should be\n\nSkip cosmetic/style issues. Skip anything that was likely fixed in previous rounds.","uuid":"6bc08494-720e-4070-9212-24160ec05b78","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AhwtQGMTzChtBRVwDzdFP3","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n     2→import path from \"path\";\n     3→import fs from \"fs\";\n     4→\n     5→const DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\n     6→const DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n     7→\n     8→// Ensure data directory exists\n     9→if (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n    10→  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→const db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n    14→\n    15→// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\n    16→db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n    17→db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n    18→\n    19→// Initialize schema\n    20→db.exec(`\n    21→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    22→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    23→    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    24→    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    25→    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    26→    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    27→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    28→  );\n    29→\n    30→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    31→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    32→    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    33→    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    34→    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    35→    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    37→    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    38→    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    39→    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    40→    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    41→    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    42→    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    43→    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    44→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    45→    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    46→  );\n    47→\n    48→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    49→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    50→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    51→    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    52→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    53→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    54→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    55→  );\n    56→\n    57→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    58→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    59→    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    60→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    61→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    62→  );\n    63→\n    64→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    65→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    66→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    67→    listing_id INTEGER,\n    68→    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    69→    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    70→    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    71→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    72→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    73→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    74→  );\n    75→\n    76→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    77→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    78→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    79→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    80→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n    81→      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    82→    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    83→    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    84→    decided_at TEXT,\n    85→    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    86→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    87→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    88→  );\n    89→`);\n    90→\n    91→// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\n    92→try {\n    93→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n    94→} catch {\n    95→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n    96→}\n    97→\n    98→// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\n    99→try {\n   100→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n   101→} catch {\n   102→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   103→}\n   104→\n   105→// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\n   106→try {\n   107→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   108→} catch {\n   109→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   110→}\n   111→\n   112→// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\n   113→try {\n   114→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n   115→} catch {\n   116→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\n   120→try {\n   121→  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n   122→} catch {\n   123→  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n   124→}\n   125→\n   126→// Tables for Telegram bot integration\n   127→db.exec(`\n   128→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n   129→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   130→    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   131→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   132→    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n   133→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n   134→  );\n   135→\n   136→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n   137→    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n   138→    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   139→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n   140→  );\n   141→\n   142→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n   143→    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   144→    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   145→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   146→    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n   147→    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n   148→    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   149→  );\n   150→`);\n   151→\n   152→// Rating and Reputation system\n   153→db.exec(`\n   154→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n   155→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n   156→    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   157→    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   158→    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n   159→    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n   160→    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n   161→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n   162→    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n   163→    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n   164→    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n   165→    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n   166→  );\n   167→`);\n   168→\n   169→// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\n   170→db.exec(`\n   171→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n   172→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n   173→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n   174→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n   175→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n   176→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n   177→`);\n   178→\n   179→export default db;\n   180→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"a475c258-d829-4940-8aac-4544a13f5680","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:47.647Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01X88A9X3LZPknu8TZgHbihe","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { getIronSession, type SessionOptions } from \"iron-session\";\n     2→import { cookies } from \"next/headers\";\n     3→\n     4→export interface SessionData {\n     5→  userId?: number;\n     6→  email?: string;\n     7→  displayName?: string;\n     8→}\n     9→\n    10→const DEV_SECRET =\n    11→  \"bookmate-development-secret-key-change-in-production-32chars!\";\n    12→\n    13→function getSessionOptions(): SessionOptions {\n    14→  const secret = process.env.SESSION_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!secret && process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\") {\n    16→    throw new Error(\n    17→      \"SESSION_SECRET environment variable is required in production\"\n    18→    );\n    19→  }\n    20→  return {\n    21→    password: secret || DEV_SECRET,\n    22→    cookieName: \"bookmate_session\",\n    23→    cookieOptions: {\n    24→      httpOnly: true,\n    25→      secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === \"production\" && process.env.HTTPS_ENABLED === \"true\",\n    26→      sameSite: \"lax\",\n    27→      maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, // 1 week\n    28→    },\n    29→  };\n    30→}\n    31→\n    32→export async function getSession() {\n    33→  const cookieStore = await cookies();\n    34→  return getIronSession<SessionData>(cookieStore, getSessionOptions());\n    35→}\n    36→\n    37→export async function requireAuth() {\n    38→  const session = await getSession();\n    39→  if (!session.userId) {\n    40→    return null;\n    41→  }\n    42→  return session;\n    43→}\n    44→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"1615867a-df94-49d8-bdb1-ea76a6958d49","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:47.731Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VDP4iYzSVC2iJQYdne9QqN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import db from \"./db\";\n     2→import { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\n     3→import { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→function getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n     6→  const user = db\n     7→    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n     8→    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n     9→  return user?.email || null;\n    10→}\n    11→\n    12→export function createNotification(\n    13→  userId: number,\n    14→  listingId: number | null,\n    15→  type: string,\n    16→  message: string\n    17→) {\n    18→  db.prepare(\n    19→    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    20→  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n    21→\n    22→  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n    23→  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n    24→  if (email) {\n    25→    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    26→    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content\n    27→    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages\n    28→    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;\n    29→    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {\n    30→      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    31→    });\n    32→  }\n    33→}\n    34→\n    35→function getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n    36→  switch (type) {\n    37→    case \"new_member\":\n    38→      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    39→    case \"group_full\":\n    40→      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    41→    case \"application_received\":\n    42→      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    43→    case \"application_approved\":\n    44→      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    45→    case \"application_rejected\":\n    46→      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    47→    case \"rating_received\":\n    48→      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    49→    case \"listing_deleted\":\n    50→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    51→    case \"listing_updated\":\n    52→      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    53→    case \"telegram_ready\":\n    54→      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    55→    case \"discord_ready\":\n    56→      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    57→    default:\n    58→      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n    59→  }\n    60→}\n    61→\n    62→export function notifyListingAuthor(\n    63→  listingId: number,\n    64→  joinerName: string\n    65→) {\n    66→  const listing = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    69→    )\n    70→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    71→\n    72→  if (listing) {\n    73→    createNotification(\n    74→      listing.author_id,\n    75→      listingId,\n    76→      \"new_member\",\n    77→      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    78→    );\n    79→  }\n    80→}\n    81→\n    82→export function notifyApplicationReceived(\n    83→  listingId: number,\n    84→  applicantName: string\n    85→) {\n    86→  const listing = db\n    87→    .prepare(\n    88→      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    89→    )\n    90→    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n    91→\n    92→  if (listing) {\n    93→    createNotification(\n    94→      listing.author_id,\n    95→      listingId,\n    96→      \"application_received\",\n    97→      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    98→    );\n    99→  }\n   100→}\n   101→\n   102→export function notifyApplicationDecision(\n   103→  userId: number,\n   104→  listingId: number,\n   105→  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n   106→) {\n   107→  const listing = db\n   108→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   109→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n   110→\n   111→  if (listing) {\n   112→    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n   113→    const message =\n   114→      decision === \"approved\"\n   115→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   116→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   117→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   118→  }\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   122→  const listing = db\n   123→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   124→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n   126→  const members = db\n   127→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   128→    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n   129→\n   130→  if (listing) {\n   131→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   132→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   133→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   134→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   135→    const message = botConfigured\n   136→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   137→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   138→\n   139→    for (const member of members) {\n   140→      createNotification(\n   141→        member.user_id,\n   142→        listingId,\n   143→        \"group_full\",\n   144→        message\n   145→      );\n   146→    }\n   147→  }\n   148→}\n   149→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"6ded1ccf-8cfd-4268-9c13-9adb8395feb9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:48.003Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XsJayCsUpu93yBUzgAv27R","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n     5→ * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n     6→ */\n     7→export function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n     8→  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n     9→  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n    10→  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    11→    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    12→    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    13→    return false;\n    14→  }\n    15→  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n    16→}\n    17→\n    18→/**\n    19→ * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n    20→ */\n    21→export function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n    22→  return text\n    23→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    24→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    25→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    26→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    27→    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n    28→}\n    29→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"cc8073d2-c2e8-4a42-8cd5-72058565b5b3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:50.770Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01PEBF59swiGpVzUZiKbHWCb","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Pj4xB7oAt3pVCVJhsdekAW","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1100,"cache_read_input_tokens":13701,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1100,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":55,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"a1fa00dc-a478-4967-973b-c1b908089eae"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Pj4xB7oAt3pVCVJhsdekAW","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"0fbda003-9b63-49e6-83ec-d6827c8927b2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:53.518Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"af032ea10c8e1c9f9","tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":15168,"tool_uses":8,"duration_ms":12116},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"bc5ae928-65fc-4ca3-869b-4b38966bacf8","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01PEBF59swiGpVzUZiKbHWCb","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01RN1s1cpBSZRqMJwXRknd6d","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/create/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1100,"cache_read_input_tokens":13701,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1100,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":55,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"4c125ac4-e624-40d7-9086-4fbf3f78eedb"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RN1s1cpBSZRqMJwXRknd6d","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    46→    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n    47→        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n    48→        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n    49→      return NextResponse.json(\n    50→        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n    51→        { status: 400 }\n    52→      );\n    53→    }\n    54→\n    55→    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n    56→      return NextResponse.json(\n    57→        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n    58→        { status: 400 }\n    59→      );\n    60→    }\n    61→\n    62→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    63→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    64→      return NextResponse.json(\n    65→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    66→        { status: 400 }\n    67→      );\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    71→      return NextResponse.json(\n    72→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    73→        { status: 400 }\n    74→      );\n    75→    }\n    76→\n    77→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    78→      return NextResponse.json(\n    79→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    80→        { status: 400 }\n    81→      );\n    82→    }\n    83→\n    84→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    85→    if (startDate < today) {\n    86→      return NextResponse.json(\n    87→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    88→        { status: 400 }\n    89→      );\n    90→    }\n    91→\n    92→    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n    93→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    94→      return NextResponse.json(\n    95→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    96→        { status: 400 }\n    97→      );\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n   101→      ? platformPreference\n   102→      : \"telegram\";\n   103→\n   104→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n   105→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n   106→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n   107→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n   108→        ? bookCoverUrl\n   109→        : \"\";\n   110→\n   111→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n   112→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   113→      const result = db\n   114→        .prepare(\n   115→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n   116→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   117→        )\n   118→        .run(\n   119→          session.userId,\n   120→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   121→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   122→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   123→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   124→          language || \"English\",\n   125→          readingPace.trim(),\n   126→          startDate,\n   127→          meetingFormat,\n   128→          size,\n   129→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   130→          platform\n   131→        );\n   132→\n   133→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   134→      db.prepare(\n   135→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   136→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   137→\n   138→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   139→    });\n   140→\n   141→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { id: listingId },\n   145→      { status: 201 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  } catch (error) {\n   148→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   149→    return NextResponse.json(\n   150→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   151→      { status: 500 }\n   152→    );\n   153→  }\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"3a0134ef-1540-4d17-98f1-75b6d705a600","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:53.601Z"}

{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"af032ea10c8e1c9f9","tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":18552,"tool_uses":10,"duration_ms":15321},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"65649263-9c1c-4ec7-b10c-daac08a98b2f","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PjkCqeZ7qaKQzQx8yRH9Lk","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    72→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    73→    const freshListing = db\n    74→      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→    if (!freshListing) {\n    78→      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    79→    }\n    80→\n    81→    const { count } = db\n    82→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    83→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    84→\n    85→    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    86→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    db.prepare(\n    90→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    91→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    92→\n    93→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    94→    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    95→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    99→  });\n   100→\n   101→  const result = joinTransaction();\n   102→\n   103→  if (result.error) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   108→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   109→\n   110→  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n   111→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   112→  }\n   113→\n   114→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   115→}\n   116→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"a34d625c-84e6-44db-9922-26521adce30c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:56.820Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HEefi6SEvr2rUbPxCj1gBp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    92→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    93→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    94→  }\n    95→\n    96→  return NextResponse.json({\n    97→    listing: {\n    98→      ...safeListingData,\n    99→      members,\n   100→      memberCount: members.length,\n   101→      isMember,\n   102→      isAuthor,\n   103→      hasApplied,\n   104→      applicationStatus,\n   105→      pendingApplicants,\n   106→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   107→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   108→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   109→    },\n   110→  });\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→export async function PATCH(\n   114→  req: NextRequest,\n   115→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   116→) {\n   117→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   118→  if (!session) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   120→  }\n   121→\n   122→  const { id } = await params;\n   123→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   124→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   125→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  const listing = db\n   129→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   130→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (!listing) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   134→  }\n   135→\n   136→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   137→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   141→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json(\n   143→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   144→      { status: 400 }\n   145→    );\n   146→  }\n   147→\n   148→  try {\n   149→    const body = await req.json();\n   150→    const {\n   151→      language,\n   152→      readingPace,\n   153→      startDate,\n   154→      meetingFormat,\n   155→      maxGroupSize,\n   156→      requiresApproval,\n   157→      platformPreference,\n   158→    } = body;\n   159→\n   160→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   161→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   162→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   163→    }\n   164→\n   165→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   166→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   167→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→      }\n   169→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   170→      if (startDate < today) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→    }\n   174→\n   175→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   176→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   180→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   181→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→      }\n   183→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   184→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   185→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   186→      }\n   187→\n   188→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   189→      const memberCount = (db\n   190→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   191→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   192→\n   193→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   194→        return NextResponse.json(\n   195→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   196→          { status: 400 }\n   197→        );\n   198→      }\n   199→    }\n   200→\n   201→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   202→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   203→    }\n   204→\n   205→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   206→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   210→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   211→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   212→\n   213→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   214→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   215→      values.push(language);\n   216→    }\n   217→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   218→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   219→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   220→    }\n   221→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   222→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   223→      values.push(startDate);\n   224→    }\n   225→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   226→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   227→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   228→    }\n   229→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   230→      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n   231→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(newSize);\n   233→\n   234→      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n   235→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   236→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   237→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   238→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n   239→        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   240→        values.push(0);\n   241→      }\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    values.push(listingId);\n   257→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   258→\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   260→  } catch (error) {\n   261→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   262→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   263→  }\n   264→}\n   265→\n   266→export async function DELETE(\n   267→  _req: NextRequest,\n   268→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   269→) {\n   270→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   271→  if (!session) {\n   272→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   273→  }\n   274→\n   275→  const { id } = await params;\n   276→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   277→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   278→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   279→  }\n   280→\n   281→  const listing = db\n   282→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   283→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   284→\n   285→  if (!listing) {\n   286→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   287→  }\n   288→\n   289→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   290→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   291→  }\n   292→\n   293→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   294→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   295→    return NextResponse.json(\n   296→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   297→      { status: 400 }\n   298→    );\n   299→  }\n   300→\n   301→  try {\n   302→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   303→    const members = db\n   304→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   305→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   306→\n   307→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   308→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   309→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   310→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   311→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   312→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   313→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   314→    });\n   315→\n   316→    deleteTransaction();\n   317→\n   318→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   319→    for (const member of members) {\n   320→      try {\n   321→        createNotification(\n   322→          member.user_id,\n   323→          null,\n   324→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   325→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   326→        );\n   327→      } catch {\n   328→        // Notification failure should not block response\n   329→      }\n   330→    }\n   331→\n   332→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   333→  } catch (error) {\n   334→    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n   335→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   336→  }\n   337→}\n   338→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"32bded45-46f0-4636-8234-a5418c39448e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:56.995Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FSJZUZmTHHhpDWQwVvzP2y","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_015Cx8whuYiwVVfZwnQ1kHXy","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1533,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4653,"cache_read_input_tokens":18117,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4653,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"0a746df3-edbc-4693-ba6b-75879e97d54a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015Cx8whuYiwVVfZwnQ1kHXy","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    45→  }\n    46→\n    47→  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n    48→  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    49→    // Check if already a member\n    50→    const isMember = db\n    51→      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    52→      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    53→\n    54→    if (isMember) {\n    55→      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    59→    const currentListing = db\n    60→      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    61→      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n    62→\n    63→    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n    64→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    65→    }\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    68→    const existingApp = db\n    69→      .prepare(\n    70→        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    71→      )\n    72→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n    73→\n    74→    if (existingApp) {\n    75→      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n    76→        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n    77→      }\n    78→      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n    79→        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n    80→      }\n    81→      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n    82→      db.prepare(\n    83→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    84→      ).run(existingApp.id);\n    85→\n    86→      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    // Insert new application\n    90→    db.prepare(\n    91→      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    92→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    93→\n    94→    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}\n   108→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"e84c9f8b-518b-48af-ab9c-a695afe67851","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:59.743Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"af032ea10c8e1c9f9","tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","description":"Reading app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":24809,"tool_uses":12,"duration_ms":18409},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"49998b80-7188-4b91-a1f6-1a5c87c5a31c","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01FSJZUZmTHHhpDWQwVvzP2y","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01LFj11K7GYEpzExYHicpzVV","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1533,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4653,"cache_read_input_tokens":18117,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4653,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"172b6129-f19e-4be6-875f-26e86168fd35"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LFj11K7GYEpzExYHicpzVV","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function PATCH(\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n    35→\n    36→  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n    44→  const application = db\n    45→    .prepare(\n    46→      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    47→    )\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    49→\n    50→  if (!application) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n    53→      { status: 404 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n    58→\n    59→  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\n    63→      const { count } = db\n    64→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    66→\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    68→        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n    69→      }\n    70→\n    71→      // Update application status\n    72→      db.prepare(\n    73→        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\n    75→\n    76→      // Add to members\n    77→      db.prepare(\n    78→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n    80→\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n    85→        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    86→\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\n    89→          .prepare(\n    90→            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    91→          )\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n    93→\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n    95→          db.prepare(\n    96→            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\n    98→        }\n    99→\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n   101→      }\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n   103→    });\n   104→\n   105→    try {\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\n   107→\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n   109→      try {\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n   111→\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   116→          }\n   117→        }\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\n   119→        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n   120→      }\n   121→\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   123→    } catch (err) {\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n   126→    }\n   127→  } else {\n   128→    // Reject\n   129→    db.prepare(\n   130→      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\n   132→\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n   134→\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   136→  }\n   137→}\n   138→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"3c810561-291b-44df-aa41-869e451c36f6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:02:59.892Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01BveW4XheU2PvNrzaf8nyMd","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BdPa36E1DGm6MYjnS4zoAU","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5224,"cache_read_input_tokens":22770,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5224,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":37,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"13fc0baf-32eb-47dd-b2d0-53dc36ae9cbd"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BdPa36E1DGm6MYjnS4zoAU","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"fb2e2223-e488-40c5-a10a-b257eb8400ad","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:05.955Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NYj86rixi5zPJTsMvp6ZvS","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"a189e7ff-28c3-4220-999e-12343fbdd45e","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:06.099Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GH59ZGKKcrnQaHQhLoYtAm","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"ef2fdc27-8b98-459f-90d2-8e222bce6fef","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:09.517Z"}
