{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KLrqu1iXZeCH6ujPjAcgrQ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    73→  const listing = db\n    74→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→  if (!listing) {\n    78→    return NextResponse.json(\n    79→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    80→      { status: 404 }\n    81→    );\n    82→  }\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    87→      { status: 400 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  // Verify both users are members\n    92→  const raterMember = db\n    93→    .prepare(\n    94→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    95→    )\n    96→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    97→\n    98→  if (!raterMember) {\n    99→    return NextResponse.json(\n   100→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   101→      { status: 403 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  }\n   104→\n   105→  const ratedMember = db\n   106→    .prepare(\n   107→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   108→    )\n   109→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   110→\n   111→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   112→    return NextResponse.json(\n   113→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   114→      { status: 400 }\n   115→    );\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   119→  const existing = db\n   120→    .prepare(\n   121→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   122→    )\n   123→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   124→\n   125→  if (existing) {\n   126→    db.prepare(\n   127→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   128→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   129→  } else {\n   130→    db.prepare(\n   131→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   132→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   133→\n   134→    // Notify the rated user\n   135→    createNotification(\n   136→      ratedUserId,\n   137→      listingId,\n   138→      \"rating_received\",\n   139→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   140→    );\n   141→  }\n   142→\n   143→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   148→ *\n   149→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   150→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   151→ */\n   152→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   153→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   154→  if (!session) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   157→      { status: 401 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   162→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   163→    return NextResponse.json(\n   164→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   165→      { status: 400 }\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   169→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→\n   176→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   177→  const isMember = db\n   178→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   179→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   180→  if (!isMember) {\n   181→    return NextResponse.json(\n   182→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   183→      { status: 403 }\n   184→    );\n   185→  }\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   188→  const givenRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rated_user_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   203→  const receivedRatings = db\n   204→    .prepare(\n   205→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   206→       FROM ratings r\n   207→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   208→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   209→    )\n   210→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   211→      rater_id: number;\n   212→      score: number;\n   213→      comment: string;\n   214→      display_name: string;\n   215→    }[];\n   216→\n   217→  return NextResponse.json({\n   218→    givenRatings,\n   219→    receivedRatings,\n   220→  });\n   221→}\n   222→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"980d0130-ecfd-453a-8d8a-d1217229c66c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:09.569Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012RyVNph5Wyn2iXpRsEFkCx","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"18d1b0b7-fae8-4d42-9531-bb0589b336a1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:12.300Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01T7fdNLDqz8wcb2kntXfCyL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Wav3PnfKKx6bfaFnmuYZtY","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5892,"cache_read_input_tokens":27994,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5892,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"ffbc13a7-1409-4cce-b66d-bfbad1cad12b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Wav3PnfKKx6bfaFnmuYZtY","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"7e944bba-aa1a-4b3c-b046-1db83b457855","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:12.658Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01XcD8Nk7K1sdqDhjJ5RiTH4","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01C5knhHNSmUuK3pTZeEP4qb","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/discord/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2092,"cache_read_input_tokens":33886,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2092,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":51,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"42990003-2a33-4d53-b6a2-9cc9e759b90e"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01C5knhHNSmUuK3pTZeEP4qb","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * This endpoint handles:\n    16→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    17→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    18→ *\n    19→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    20→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    21→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    22→ */\n    23→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    24→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    25→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    26→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    28→  }\n    29→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    30→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  try {\n    35→    const body = await req.json();\n    36→    const { type } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    39→      return handleLink(body);\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    43→    if (type === 1) {\n    44→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    46→    }\n    47→\n    48→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    49→  } catch (err) {\n    50→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→async function handleLink(body: {\n    59→  guildId: string;\n    60→  listingId: number;\n    61→  channelId?: string;\n    62→}) {\n    63→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    64→\n    65→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    80→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    81→    return NextResponse.json(\n    82→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    83→      { status: 400 }\n    84→    );\n    85→  }\n    86→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    87→    return NextResponse.json(\n    88→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    89→      { status: 400 }\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→\n    93→  const listing = db\n    94→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    95→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    96→\n    97→  if (!listing) {\n    98→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   102→    return NextResponse.json(\n   103→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   104→      { status: 400 }\n   105→    );\n   106→  }\n   107→\n   108→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   109→    return NextResponse.json(\n   110→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   111→      { status: 400 }\n   112→    );\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   116→\n   117→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   118→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   119→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   120→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   121→      .toLowerCase()\n   122→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   123→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   124→\n   125→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   126→      guildId,\n   127→      channelName,\n   128→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   129→    );\n   130→\n   131→    if (!channel) {\n   132→      return NextResponse.json(\n   133→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   134→        { status: 500 }\n   135→      );\n   136→    }\n   137→\n   138→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Create invite link\n   142→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   143→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   144→    return NextResponse.json(\n   145→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   146→      { status: 500 }\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  // Save to DB\n   151→  db.prepare(\n   152→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   153→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   154→\n   155→  // Notify all members\n   156→  const members = db\n   157→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   158→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   159→\n   160→  for (const member of members) {\n   161→    createNotification(\n   162→      member.user_id,\n   163→      listingId,\n   164→      \"discord_ready\",\n   165→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→\n   169→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   170→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   171→    targetChannelId,\n   172→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   173→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   174→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   175→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   176→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   177→  );\n   178→\n   179→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   180→}\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"7307705f-5547-4e5b-8e34-94edc1ec255d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:15.122Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JmHYW3E81Pwpk9DdxTYKc9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    12→\n    13→/**\n    14→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    15→ *\n    16→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    17→ *\n    18→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    19→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    20→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    21→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    22→ *\n    23→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    24→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    25→ */\n    26→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    27→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    28→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    29→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    31→  }\n    32→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    33→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    38→  try {\n    39→    update = await req.json();\n    40→  } catch {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    45→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    46→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    47→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    52→  if (update.message) {\n    53→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→\n    60→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    61→  chat: {\n    62→    id: number;\n    63→    title?: string;\n    64→    type: string;\n    65→  };\n    66→  from: {\n    67→    id: number;\n    68→    first_name: string;\n    69→  };\n    70→  new_chat_member: {\n    71→    user: {\n    72→      id: number;\n    73→      is_bot: boolean;\n    74→    };\n    75→    status: string;\n    76→  };\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→interface TelegramMessage {\n    80→  chat: {\n    81→    id: number;\n    82→    type: string;\n    83→    title?: string;\n    84→  };\n    85→  text?: string;\n    86→  from?: {\n    87→    id: number;\n    88→  };\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    93→ *\n    94→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    95→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    96→ * 1. Creates the group\n    97→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    98→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    99→ *\n   100→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   101→ */\n   102→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   103→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   104→\n   105→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   106→  if (\n   107→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   108→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   109→  ) {\n   110→    return;\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Only process group chats\n   114→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   115→    return;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   119→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   120→  const pending = db\n   121→    .prepare(\n   122→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   123→    )\n   124→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→\n   126→  if (pending) {\n   127→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   128→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   129→      chat.id\n   130→    );\n   131→    return;\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   135→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   136→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   137→  await sendMessage(\n   138→    chat.id,\n   139→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   140→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   141→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   142→  );\n   143→\n   144→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   145→  try {\n   146→    db.prepare(\n   147→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   148→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   149→  } catch {\n   150→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   151→  }\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   156→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   157→ */\n   158→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   159→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   160→    return;\n   161→  }\n   162→\n   163→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   164→\n   165→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   166→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   167→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   168→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   169→    if (listingId) {\n   170→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   171→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   172→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   173→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   174→        return;\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      const linkedUser = db\n   178→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   179→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   180→\n   181→      if (linkedUser) {\n   182→        const listing = db\n   183→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   184→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   185→\n   186→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   187→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   188→          return;\n   189→        }\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   193→      await sendMessage(\n   194→        message.chat.id,\n   195→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   196→      );\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→  }\n   200→\n   201→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   202→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   203→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   204→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   205→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   206→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   207→      return;\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   211→    const linkedUser = db\n   212→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   213→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   214→\n   215→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   216→      await sendMessage(\n   217→        message.chat.id,\n   218→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   219→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   220→      );\n   221→      return;\n   222→    }\n   223→\n   224→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   225→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   226→      .prepare(\n   227→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   228→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   229→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   230→         AND author_id = ?\n   231→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   232→      )\n   233→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   234→\n   235→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   236→      await sendMessage(\n   237→        message.chat.id,\n   238→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   239→      );\n   240→      return;\n   241→    }\n   242→\n   243→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   244→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   245→      return;\n   246→    }\n   247→\n   248→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   249→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   250→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   251→    await sendMessage(\n   252→      message.chat.id,\n   253→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   254→    );\n   255→    return;\n   256→  }\n   257→\n   258→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   259→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   260→  if (linkMatch) {\n   261→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   262→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   263→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   264→      return;\n   265→    }\n   266→\n   267→    const linkedUser = db\n   268→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   269→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   270→\n   271→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   272→      await sendMessage(\n   273→        message.chat.id,\n   274→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   275→      );\n   276→      return;\n   277→    }\n   278→\n   279→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   280→\n   281→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   282→    const listing = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   284→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   285→\n   286→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   287→      await sendMessage(\n   288→        message.chat.id,\n   289→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   290→      );\n   291→      return;\n   292→    }\n   293→\n   294→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   295→      await sendMessage(\n   296→        message.chat.id,\n   297→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   298→      );\n   299→      return;\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   303→  }\n   304→}\n   305→\n   306→/**\n   307→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   308→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   309→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   310→ * 3. Notify all members\n   311→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   312→ */\n   313→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   314→  const listing = db\n   315→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   316→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   317→\n   318→  if (!listing) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   320→    return;\n   321→  }\n   322→\n   323→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   324→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   325→    return;\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  // Try to create an invite link\n   329→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   330→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   331→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   332→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   333→  }\n   334→\n   335→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   336→    await sendMessage(\n   337→      chatId,\n   338→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   339→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   340→    );\n   341→    return;\n   342→  }\n   343→\n   344→  // Save to database\n   345→  db.prepare(\n   346→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   347→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   348→\n   349→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   350→  const members = db\n   351→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   352→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   355→  for (const member of members) {\n   356→    createNotification(\n   357→      member.user_id,\n   358→      listingId,\n   359→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   360→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   361→    );\n   362→  }\n   363→\n   364→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   365→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   366→  await sendMessage(\n   367→    chatId,\n   368→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   369→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   370→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   371→  );\n   372→}\n   373→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"f69472a4-a3f8-42cc-90f1-4c7052914397","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:15.138Z"}

  2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"1e153944-b224-4811-97a3-4c6799a48c2f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:18.026Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EEBbYsWzTxV32nxRvUKFQX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"37fdd98b-465d-4d35-83df-c9edc28855f3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:18.312Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LCGsykK5vGETtTN3YBhgcD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"064a5516-c5f7-4b7b-a5bd-b1304208bd46","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:25.909Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014uz7t7m9UbwnAo4THYfaCb","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"31429919-4a4d-4e05-973b-2538552851f3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:27.238Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01M5Fc7nT5WWmW9kcEHjxiwc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Kpsh5e4nckwoNc2PFdMAsq","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/setup/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1886,"cache_read_input_tokens":44991,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":1886,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":62,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"eb0f6aa0-726e-4911-8da4-2199bf4f338c"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KF7c4fxT5LC6FLu7oD4VaX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const startTime = Date.now();\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET() {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    // Check database connectivity\n    10→    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    11→    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n    12→\n    13→    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n    14→      status: \"healthy\",\n    15→      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    16→      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n    17→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    18→    };\n    19→\n    20→    // Only expose detailed stats to authenticated users\n    21→    try {\n    22→      const session = await getSession();\n    23→      if (session?.userId) {\n    24→        const stats = db.prepare(`\n    25→          SELECT\n    26→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n    27→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n    28→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    29→        `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n    30→\n    31→        response.stats = {\n    32→          users: stats.users,\n    33→          listings: stats.listings,\n    34→          openListings: stats.open_listings,\n    35→        };\n    36→      }\n    37→    } catch {\n    38→      // Session check failed (e.g., no cookies context) — skip stats\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(response);\n    42→  } catch (error) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      {\n    45→        status: \"unhealthy\",\n    46→        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    47→        database: \"error\",\n    48→        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n    49→        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    50→      },\n    51→      { status: 503 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"0134ab69-9790-45f0-808f-6ff82fa0b474","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:43.167Z"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Kpsh5e4nckwoNc2PFdMAsq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     9→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    14→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    18→      { status: 500 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  const body = await req.json();\n    23→  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json(\n    29→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    30→      { status: 500 }\n    31→    );\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    35→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    38→      { status: 500 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    43→  if (!bot) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    46→      { status: 500 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    51→  if (!success) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    54→      { status: 500 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({\n    59→    ok: true,\n    60→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    61→    webhookUrl,\n    62→  });\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    69→ */\n    70→export async function GET() {\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    73→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    74→  });\n    75→}\n    76→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"443ad194-4d88-4f2e-ac41-86a088d359a6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:43.169Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CE2e5tUuw7ZNoeUFu3NzAe","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    await session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"17ed6722-8010-42b3-b383-bc72c3a599ae","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:46.286Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XSdidgeR1FNjs2WExv1QWA","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    44→\n    45→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    46→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    47→      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n    48→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    49→      const controller = new AbortController();\n    50→      abortRef.current = controller;\n    51→\n    52→      setLoading(true);\n    53→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    54→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    55→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    56→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    57→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    58→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    59→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    60→\n    61→      const qs = params.toString();\n    62→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n    63→        .then((r) => {\n    64→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    65→          return r.json();\n    66→        })\n    67→        .then((data) => {\n    68→          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n    69→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    70→          if (data.pagination) {\n    71→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    72→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    73→          }\n    74→          setError(null);\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        })\n    77→        .catch((err) => {\n    78→          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n    79→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    80→          setLoading(false);\n    81→        });\n    82→    },\n    83→    []\n    84→  );\n    85→\n    86→  // Initial fetch\n    87→  useEffect(() => {\n    88→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    89→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    90→\n    91→  // Debounced search\n    92→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    93→    setSearchQuery(value);\n    94→    setPage(1);\n    95→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    96→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n    97→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    98→    }, 400);\n    99→  };\n   100→\n   101→  // Immediate filter changes\n   102→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n   103→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n   104→    setPage(1);\n   105→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   106→  };\n   107→\n   108→  const  113→\n   114→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   115→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   116→    setPage(1);\n   117→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   124→  };\n   125→\n   126→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   127→    setPage(newPage);\n   128→ useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;\n    31→  meeting_format: string;\n    32→  max_group_size: number;\n    33→  telegram_link: string;\n    34→  is_full: number;\n    35→  requires_approval: number;\n    36→  created_at: string;\n    37→  author_name: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01QUct8y6gPvU7fwAZQNypPT","session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"3b80e922-9f06-40fc-b33a-7bbef8515e49","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:03:55.007Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ev3XYJj4JDxYwcsjgSwcyP","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     7→\n     8→interface ReadingItem {\n     9→  id: number;\n    10→  book_title: string;\n    11→  book_author: string;\n    12→  book_cover_url: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  is_full: number;\n    17→  telegram_link: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  max_group_size: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  joined_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→interface Reputation {\n    25→  averageScore: number;\n    26→  totalRatings: number;\n    27→  completedGroups: number;\n    28→  groupsRated: number;\n    29→  breakdown: Record<number, number>;\n    30→  recentRatings: {\n    31→    score: number;\n    32→    comment: string;\n    33→    created_at: string;\n    34→    book_title: string;\n    35→  }[];\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    39→\n    40→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    41→  const router = useRouter();\n    42→  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n    43→  const [bio, setBio] = useState(\"\");\n    44→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n    45→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    46→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n    47→  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    48→\n    49→  // Tab state\n    50→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"profile\");\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading activity\n    53→  const [active, setActive] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    54→  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    55→  const [upcoming, setUpcoming] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    56→  const [readingLoading, setReadingLoading] = useState(false);\n    57→\n    58→  // Genres\n    59→  const [userGenres, setUserGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    60→  const [availableGenres, setAvailableGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    61→  const [genresLoading, setGenresLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [genresSaving, setGenresSaving] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [genresMessage, setGenresMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Reputation\n    66→  const [reputation, setReputation] = useState<Reputation | null>(null);\n    67→  const [reputationLoading, setReputationLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→\n    69→  // Track which tabs have been fetched to avoid redundant requests\n    70→  const fetchedTabs = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());\n    71→\n    72→  useEffect(() => {\n    73→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    74→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    75→      .then((data) => {\n    76→        if (!data.user) {\n    77→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    78→          return;\n    79→        }\n    80→        setDisplayName(data.user.displayName);\n    81→        setBio(data.user.bio || \"\");\n    82→        setEmail(data.user.email);\n    83→        setLoading(false);\n    84→      })\n    85→      .catch(() => {\n    86→        // Network error — can't verify auth, redirect to login\n    87→        router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    88→      });\n    89→  }, [router]);\n    90→\n    91→  const fetchReading = useCallback(() => {\n    92→    setReadingLoading(true);\n    93→    fetch(\"/api/profile/reading\")\n    94→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    95→      .then((data) => {\n    96→        setActive(data.active || []);\n    97→        setHistory(data.history || []);\n    98→        setUpcoming(data.upcoming || []);\n    99→        setReadingLoading(false);\n   100→      })\n   101→      .catch(() => setReadingLoading(false));\n   102→  }, []);\n   103→\n   104→  const fetchGenres = useCallback(() => {\n   105→    setGenresLoading(true);\n   106→    fetch(\"/api/profile/genres\")\n   107→      .then((r) => r.json())\n   108→      .then((data) => {\n   109→        setUserGenres(data.genres || []);\n   110→        setAvailableGenres(data.available || []);\n   111→        setGenresLoading(false);\n   112→      })\n   113→      .catch(() => setGenresLoading(false));\n   114→  }, []);\n   115→\n   116→  const fetchReputation = useCallback(() => {\n   117→    setReputationLoading(true);\n   118→    fetch(\"/api/profile/reputation\")\n   119→      .then((r) => r.json())\n   120→      .then((data) => {\n   121→        setReputation(data.reputation || null);\n   122→        setReputationLoading(false);\n   123→      })\n   124→      .catch(() => setReputationLoading(false));\n   125→  }, []);\n   126→\n   127→  useEffect(() => {\n   128→    if (fetchedTabs.current.has(activeTab)) return;\n   129→    fetchedTabs.current.add(activeTab);\n   130→    if (activeTab === \"reading\") fetchReading();\n   131→    if (activeTab === \"genres\") fetchGenres();\n   132→    if (activeTab === \"reputation\") fetchReputation();\n   133→  }, [activeTab, fetchReading, fetchGenres, fetchReputation]);\n   134→\n   135→  const handleSave = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n   136→    e.preventDefault();\n   137→    setSaving(true);\n   138→    setMessage(\"\");\n   139→\n   140→    try {\n   141→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/profile\", {\n   142→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   143→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   144→        body: JSON.stringify({ displayName, bio }),\n   145→      });\n   146→      const data = await res.json();\n   147→      if (res.ok) {\n   148→        setMessage(\"Profile updated!\");\n   149→      } else {\n   150→        setMessage(data.error || \"Failed to update\");\n   151→      }\n   152→    } catch {\n   153→      setMessage(\"Something went wrong\");\n   154→    } finally {\n   155→      setSaving(false);\n   156→    }\n   157→  };\n   158→\n   159→  const toggleGenre = (genre: string) => {\n   160→    setUserGenres((prev) =>\n   161→      prev.includes(genre) ? prev.filter((g) => g !== genre) : [...prev, genre]\n   162→    );\n   163→  };\n   164→\n   165→  const saveGenres = async () => {\n   166→    setGenresSaving(true);\n   167→    setGenresMessage(\"\");\n   168→    try {\n   169→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/profile/genres\", {\n   170→        method: \"PUT\",\n   171→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   172→        body: JSON.stringify({ genres: userGenres }),\n   173→      });\n   174→      if (res.ok) {\n   175→        setGenresMessage(\"Genres saved!\");\n   176→      } else {\n   177→        setGenresMessage(\"Failed to save genres\");\n   178→      }\n   179→    } catch {\n   180→      setGenresMessage(\"Something went wrong\");\n   181→    } finally {\n   182→      setGenresSaving(false);\n   183→    }\n   184→  };\n   185→\n   186→  if (loading) {\n   187→    return (\n   188→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n   189→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n   190→      </div>\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  const tabs: { key: TabKey; label: string }[] = [\n   195→    { key: \"profile\", label: \"Profile\" },\n   196→    { key: \"reading\", label: \"Reading Activity\" },\n   197→    { key: \"genres\", label: \"Favorite Genres\" },\n   198→    { key: \"reputation\", label: \"Reputation\" },\n   199→  ];\n   200→\n   201→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {\n   202→    // Append T00:00:00 for date-only strings to prevent UTC-offset date shifts\n   203→    const d = dateStr.length === 10 ? new Date(dateStr + \"T00:00:00\") : new Date(dateStr);\n   204→    return d.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", { month: \"short\", day: \"numeric\", year: \"numeric\" });\n   205→  };\n   206→\n   207→  return (\n   208→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n   209→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Your Profile</h1>\n   210→\n   211→      {/* Tabs */}\n   212→      <div\n   213→        className=\"flex gap-1 mb-4 sm:mb-6 p-1 rounded-lg overflow-x-auto\"\n   214→        style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\", WebkitOverflowScrolling: \"touch\" }}\n   215→        role=\"tablist\"\n   216→        aria-label=\"Profile sections\"\n   217→      >\n   218→        {tabs.map((tab) => (\n   219→          <button\n   220→            key={tab.key}\n   221→            id={`tab-${tab.key}`}\n   222→            role=\"tab\"\n   223→            aria-selected={activeTab === tab.key}\n   224→            aria-controls={`tabpanel-${tab.key}`}\n   225→ (\n   378→            <>\n   379→              {/* Score Overview */}\n   380→              <div className=\"card\">\n   381→                <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center gap-4 sm:gap-6\">\n   382→                  <div className=\"text-center\">\n   383→                    <div\n   384→                      className=\"text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold\"\n   385→                      style={{ color: reputation.averageScore >= 4 ? \"var(--color-success)\" : reputation.averageScore >= 3 ? \"#f59e0b\" : \"var(--color-text)\" }}\n   386→                    >\n   387→                      {reputation.totalRatings > 0 ? reputation.averageScore : \"--\"}\n   388→                    </div>\n   389→                    <div\n   390→                      className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   391→                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   392→                    >\n   393→                      {reputation.totalRatings > 0\n   394→                        ? `${reputation.totalRatings} rating${reputation.totalRatings !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}`\n   395→                        : \"No ratings yet\"}\n   396→                    </div>\n   397→                  </div>\n   398→\n   399→                  <div className=\"flex-1\" style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n   400→                    {/* Star breakdown */}\n   401→                    {[5, 4, 3, 2, 1].map((star) => {\n   402→                      const count = reputation.breakdown[star] || 0;\n   403→                      const pct = reputation.totalRatings > 0\n   404→                        ? (\n   652→        <div className=\"card\">\n   653→          <p\n   654→            className=\"text-sm text-center py-4\"\n   655→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   656→          >\n   657→            {emptyText}\n   658→          </p>\n   659→        </div>\n   660→      ) : (\n   661→        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n   662→          {items.map((item) => (\n   663→            <Link\n   664→              key={item.id}\n   665→              href={`/listings/${item.id}`}\n   666→              className=\"card flex gap-4 items-start hover:shadow-md transition-shadow\"\n   667→              style={{ display: \"flex\", textDecoration: \"none\", color: \"inherit\" }}\n   668→            >\n
