     if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");","numLines":70,"startLine":170,"totalLines":338}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NJkB2d33d45jo1Hmim4PRK","type":"tool_result","content":"   115→        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n   116→        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n   117→    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n   118→  }\n   119→}\n   120→\n   121→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   122→  const listing = db\n   123→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   124→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n   126→  const members = db\n   127→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   128→    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n   129→\n   130→  if (listing) {\n   131→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   132→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   133→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   134→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   135→    const message = botConfigured\n   136→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   137→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   138→\n   139→    for (const member of members) {\n   140→      createNotification(\n   141→        member.user_id,\n   142→        listingId,\n   143→        \"group_full\",\n   144→        message"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"59ed03f9-cbe4-45a3-a15e-950dcfc1b00f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:06:47.945Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message","numLines":30,"startLine":115,"totalLines":149}}}

168→\n   169→// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\n   170→db.exec(`\n   171→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n   172→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n   173→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n   174→  CREATE INDEX IF NOT IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n   177→`);\n   178→\n   179→export default db;"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"76384949-cb66-4dc8-9f9f-c9a9bd24f1a0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:06:48.348Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts","content":"try {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Tables for Telegram bot integration\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Rating and Reputation system\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n`);\n\nexport default db;","numLines":60,"startLine":120,"totalLines":180}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_015en5jWWot9PUthFjvDQBXy","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Let me verify the issues and read more context. The review found these actionable issues:\n\n1. **Critical**: `pending_telegram_groups` not deleted before listing delete → FK violation crash\n2. **High**: `parseInt(maxGroupSize)` inconsistency in PATCH - uses un-coerced value\n3. **High**: `comment` in ratings not type-checked\n4. **High**: BookSearch no error feedback when Open Library is down\n5. **High**: Notification count never refreshed in Navbar\n6. **High**: Missing index on `pending_telegram_groups.telegram_chat_id`\n7. **Medium**: Rate limiter unbounded growth\n\n\n8. **Medium**: Author never gets `group_full` notification\n\nI'm going to verify the remaining issues by checking the actual code, then create a GitHub issue and start implementing fixes for the ones I can confirm.\n\nSo far I'm confident about the critical FK violation where `pending_telegram_groups` isn't deleted before its parent listing, the `parseInt` bug that uses the raw value instead of the validated string, and the missing type check on `comment`. I also confirmed the missing index on `telegram_chat_id` and that the author is excluded from the `group_full` notification. const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    18→  const router = useRouter();\n    19→  const pathname = usePathname();\n    20→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    21→\n    22→  useEffect(() => {\n    23→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    24→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    25→      .then((data) => {\n    26→        if (data.user) {\n    27→          setUser(data.user);\n    28→          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n    29→        }\n    30→      })\n    31→      .catch(() => {\n    32→        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n    33→      });\n    34→  }, []);\n    35→\n    36→  // Close menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"621fecd5-6a2d-44b5-9f3e-fea8dfde7cbf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:02.386Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx","content":"  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  // Close menus on outside click\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n        setMenuOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);","numLines":30,"startLine":15,"totalLines":336}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RYGCHeVTadiSEmqFQ7uHgo","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n     3→ * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n     4→ * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n     5→ */\n     6→\n     7→interface RateLimitEntry {\n     8→  timestamps: number[];\n     9→}\n    10→\n    11→const store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n    12→\n    13→// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n    14→// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\n    15→const CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\n    16→const globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\n    17→if (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n    18→  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    19→    const now = Date.now();\n    20→    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n    21→      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n    22→      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n    23→        store.delete(key);\n    24→      }\n    25→    }\n    26→  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n    27→}\n    28→\n    29→/**\n    30→ * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n    31→ * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n    32→ * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n    33→ * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n    34→ * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n    35→ */\n    36→export function checkRateLimit(\n    37→  key: string,\n    38→  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n    39→  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n    40→): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n    41→  const now = Date.now();\n    42→  let entry = store.get(key);\n    43→\n    44→  if (!entry) {\n    45→    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    46→    store.set(key, entry);\n    47→  }\n    48→\n    49→  // Remove expired timestamps\n    50→  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n    51→\n    52→  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    53→    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    54→    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    55→    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n    59→  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n    60→}\n    61→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"d6fdc803-36a0-4dd9-9a8a-9e6a4476a61d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:02.425Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/rate-limit.ts","content":"/**\n * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n */\n\ninterface RateLimitEntry {\n  timestamps: number[];\n}\n\nconst store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n\n// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\nconst CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\nconst globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\nif (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    const now = Date.now();\n    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n        store.delete(key);\n      }\n    }\n  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n */\nexport function checkRateLimit(\n  key: string,\n  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n  const now = Date.now();\n  let entry = store.get(key);\n\n  if (!entry) {\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }\n\n  // Remove expired timestamps\n  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n\n  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n  }\n\n  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n}\n","numLines":61,"startLine":1,"totalLines":61}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01TbaHoPqzLt8YxkZTt3Kvfu","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JVwLRjLp5ermQKtEevtWyU","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });","new_string":"    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":170,"cache_read_input_tokens":46205,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":170},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"1b79249d-ff6a-48a9-b225-6bf42f2b241f"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01JVwLRjLp5ermQKtEevtWyU","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"69ef3424-5024-4a90-921f-2b5111a83b65","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:12.598Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });","newString":"    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":306,"oldLines":6,"newStart":306,"newLines":7,"lines":[" ","     // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)","     const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","+      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);","       db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":3,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file_"}},"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"5277b2ae-296b-4e85-a6ab-03ef970526b5"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HYLM1YFtLncCvBfJrWrYpt","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"8c38e23f-0ab3-4753-ae16-9b7a670d8972","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:13.963Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","newString":"      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":227,"oldLines":7,"newStart":227,"newLines":7,"lines":["       values.push(meetingFormat);","     }","     if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {","-      const newSize = parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10);","+      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","       updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");","       values.push(newSize);"," "]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019HF586Moxy7Vr6cHAMgcLW","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"b3b0428d-b766-42dd-a7bb-d34c02a9deca","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:16.181Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","oldString":"  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {","newString":"  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n *\n * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n *\n * Rules:\n * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n * - Cannot rate yourself\n * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n\n  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify listing exists and is full\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify both users are members\n  const raterMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (!raterMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const ratedMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n\n  if (!ratedMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (existing) {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n  } else {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n\n    // Notify the rated user\n    createNotification(\n      ratedUserId,\n      listingId,\n      \"rating_received\",\n      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n *\n * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n * plus the members who can still be rated.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n  if (!listingIdParam) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n  const isMember = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n  if (!isMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n  const givenRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rated_user_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n  const receivedRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rater_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    givenRatings,\n    receivedRatings,\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":62,"oldLines":8,"newStart":62,"newLines":15,"lines":["     );","   }"," ","-  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {","+  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {","     return NextResponse.json(","+      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },","+      { status: 400 }","+    );","+  }","+","+  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {","+    return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },","       { status: 400 }","     );"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01MGrAeqLWkPZTHtBR6Vezvh","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"67f75bd4-ba80-4dfb-9279-3890a1aaf0c8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:17.448Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/db.ts","oldString":"  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);","newString":"  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pending_telegram_chat_id ON pending_telegram_groups(telegram_chat_id);","originalFile":"import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport path from \"path\";\nimport fs from \"fs\";\n\nconst DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\nconst DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n\n// Ensure data directory exists\nif (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n}\n\nconst db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n\n// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\n// Initialize schema\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    listing_id INTEGER,\n    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    decided_at TEXT,\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Tables for Telegram bot integration\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Rating and Reputation system\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n`);\n\nexport default db;\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":174,"oldLines":6,"newStart":174,"newLines":7,"lines":["   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);","   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);","   CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);","+  CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pending_telegram_chat_id ON pending_telegram_groups(telegram_chat_id);"," `);"," "," export default db;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PJcVK73WkZC5nCoGiBjbFr","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"a4271f1d-bcd9-4d44-8305-76d8cd71420b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:20.709Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","oldString":"  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","newString":"  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];","originalFile":"import db from \"./db\";\nimport { sendEmail } from \"./email\";\nimport { escapeHtmlForEmail } from \"./crypto-utils\";\n\nfunction getUserEmail(userId: number): string | null {\n  const user = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT email FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(userId) as { email: string } | undefined;\n  return user?.email || null;\n}\n\nexport function createNotification(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number | null,\n  type: string,\n  message: string\n) {\n  db.prepare(\n    \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n  ).run(userId, listingId, type, message);\n\n  // Also send email notification (fire-and-forget)\n  const email = getUserEmail(userId);\n  if (email) {\n    const subject = getEmailSubject(type);\n    // HTML-escape the message to prevent injection via user-controlled content\n    // (display names, book titles) embedded in notification messages\n    const htmlBody = `<p>${escapeHtmlForEmail(message)}</p>`;\n    sendEmail(email, subject, message, htmlBody).catch(() => {\n      // Email sending is best-effort — don't block on failure\n    });\n  }\n}\n\nfunction getEmailSubject(type: string): string {\n  switch (type) {\n    case \"new_member\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Someone joined your reading group!\";\n    case \"group_full\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your reading group is full!\";\n    case \"application_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: New application for your reading group\";\n    case \"application_approved\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your application was approved!\";\n    case \"application_rejected\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Application update\";\n    case \"rating_received\":\n      return \"Bookmate: You received a new rating\";\n    case \"listing_deleted\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been cancelled\";\n    case \"listing_updated\":\n      return \"Bookmate: A reading group has been updated\";\n    case \"telegram_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Telegram reading group is ready!\";\n    case \"discord_ready\":\n      return \"Bookmate: Your Discord channel is ready!\";\n    default:\n      return \"Bookmate: Notification\";\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyListingAuthor(\n  listingId: number,\n  joinerName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"new_member\",\n      `${joinerName} joined your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationReceived(\n  listingId: number,\n  applicantName: string\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT l.author_id, l.book_title FROM listings l WHERE l.id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    createNotification(\n      listing.author_id,\n      listingId,\n      \"application_received\",\n      `${applicantName} applied to join your reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyApplicationDecision(\n  userId: number,\n  listingId: number,\n  decision: \"approved\" | \"rejected\"\n) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string } | undefined;\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const type = decision === \"approved\" ? \"application_approved\" : \"application_rejected\";\n    const message =\n      decision === \"approved\"\n        ? `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was approved!`\n        : `Your application to join \"${listing.book_title}\" was not accepted.`;\n    createNotification(userId, listingId, type, message);\n  }\n}\n\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":122,"oldLines":10,"newStart":122,"newLines":10,"lines":["   const listing = db","     .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","     .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;","-  // Exclude the author — they already received a separate \"new_member\" notification","+  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat","   const members = db","-    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")","-    .all(listingId, listing?.author_id ?? -1) as { user_id: number }[];","+    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","+    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];"," ","   if (listing) {","     const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    28→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    29→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    30→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    31→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→\n    33→  useEffect(() => {\n    34→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    35→      if (\n    36→        containerRef.current &&\n    37→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    38→      ) {\n    39→        setOpen(false);\n    40→      }\n    41→    };\n    42→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    43→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→  }, []);\n    45→\n    46→  useEffect(() => {\n    47→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    48→      setResults([]);\n    49→      return;\n    50→    }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"dc518eb9-8e2c-47a4-9bde-e10399a71120","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:23.291Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n
