useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <div\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":24,"oldLines":6,"newStart":24,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);","   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);","   const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);","+  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);","   const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);","   const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);","   const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

`https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n          setSearchError(true);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <div\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":58,"oldLines":6,"newStart":58,"newLines":7,"lines":[" ","     timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {","       setLoading(true);","+      setSearchError(false);","       try {","         const res = await fetch(","           `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,"]},{"oldStart":70,"oldLines":6,"newStart":71,"newLines":7,"lines":["       } catch (err) {","         if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {","           setResults([]);","+          setSearchError(true);","         }","       } finally {","         if `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div","numLines":80,"startLine":95,"totalLines":235}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013CAp6qp4BJwDzNkD5qBZfF","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"d002160a-397d-4d86-989a-8655a601766f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:43.620Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/BookSearch.tsx","oldString":"      {open && results.length > 0 && (","newString":"      {searchError && !loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}\n          role=\"alert\"\n        >\n          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\n\ninterface BookResult {\n  key: string;\n  title: string;\n  author_name?: string[];\n  cover_i?: number;\n}\n\ninterface Props {\n  onSelect: (book: {\n    title: string;\n    author: string;\n    coverUrl: string;\n    olid: string;\n  }) => void;\n}\n\nexport default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (\n        containerRef.current &&\n        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n      ) {\n        setOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (query.length < 3) {\n      setResults([]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    abortRef.current = controller;\n\n    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n      setLoading(true);\n      setSearchError(false);\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(\n          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n          { signal: controller.signal }\n        );\n        const data = await res.json();\n        setResults(data.docs || []);\n        setOpen(true);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n      } catch (err) {\n        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n          setResults([]);\n          setSearchError(true);\n        }\n      } finally {\n        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n          setLoading(false);\n        }\n      }\n    }, 400);\n\n    return () => {\n      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n      controller.abort();\n    };\n  }, [query]);\n\n  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    onSelect({\n      title: book.title,\n      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n        : \"\",\n      olid,\n    });\n    setQuery(book.title);\n    setOpen(false);\n    setActiveIndex(-1);\n  };\n\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n\n    switch (e.key) {\n      case \"ArrowDown\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n        break;\n      case \"ArrowUp\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n        break;\n      case \"Enter\":\n        e.preventDefault();\n        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n        }\n        break;\n      case \"Escape\":\n        setOpen(false);\n        setActiveIndex(-1);\n        break;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Scroll active option into view\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n      if (activeEl) {\n        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n      }\n    }\n  }, [activeIndex]);\n\n  const activeDescendant =\n    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n      : undefined;\n\n  return (\n    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n      <input\n        type=\"text\"\n        className=\"input-field\"\n        value={query}\n        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n        role=\"combobox\"\n        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n      />\n      {loading && (\n        <div\n          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          role=\"status\"\n          aria-live=\"polite\"\n        >\n          Searching...\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n        <div\n          ref={listboxRef}\n          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n          role=\"listbox\"\n          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n        >\n          {results.map((book, index) => (\n            <div\n              key={book.key}\n              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n              role=\"option\"\n              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n              }}\n            >\n              {book.cover_i ? (\n                <Image\n                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n                  width={32}\n                  height={48}\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n                />\n              ) : (\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n                </div>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  {book.title}\n                </div>\n                <div\n                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":170,"oldLines":6,"newStart":170,"newLines":16,"lines":["         </div>","       )}"," ","+      {searchError && !loading && (","+        <div","+          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"","+          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}","+          role=\"alert\"","+        >","+          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.","+        </div>","+      )}","+","       {open && results.length > 0 && (","         <div","           ref={listboxRef}"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"04f29989-d5b7-4edb-9d06-1d88fb86cee8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:50.146Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/components/Navbar.tsx","oldString":"  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);","newString":"  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, [pathname]);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter, usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ninterface User {\n  id: number;\n  email: string;\n  displayName: string;\n}\n\nexport default function Navbar() {\n  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const pathname = usePathname();\n  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n      .then((r) => r.json())\n      .then((data) => {\n        if (data.user) {\n          setUser(data.user);\n          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n        }\n      })\n      .catch(() => {\n        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n      });\n  }, []);\n\n  // Close menus on outside click\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n        setMenuOpen(false);\n      }\n    };\n    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n  }, []);\n\n  // Close mobile menu on route change\n  useEffect(() => {\n    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n  }, [pathname]);\n\n  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    setUser(null);\n    setMenuOpen(false);\n    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    router.push(\"/\");\n    router.refresh();\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <nav\n      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n      style={{\n        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n      }}\n    >\n      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n        <Link\n          href=\"/\"\n          className=\"text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold\"\n          style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\", letterSpacing: \"-0.03em\" }}\n          onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n        >\n          bookmate\n        </Link>\n\n        {/* Desktop nav */}\n        <div className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4\">\n          {user ? (\n            <>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/listings/create\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                + New Listing\n              </Link>\n\n              <div className=\"relative\" ref={menuRef}>\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => setMenuOpen(!menuOpen)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif\" }}\n                  aria-label={`User menu for ${user.displayName}${notifCount > 0 ? `, ${notifCount} unread notifications` : \"\"}`}\n                  aria-expanded={menuOpen}\n                  aria-haspopup=\"true\"\n                >\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                  </div>\n                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge text-white\"\n                      style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n                    >\n                      {notifCount}\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </button>\n\n                {menuOpen && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"absolute right-0 top-12 w-48 card shadow-lg py-2 px-0\"\n                    style={{ padding: 0 }}\n                    role=\"menu\"\n                    aria-label=\"User menu\"\n                  >\n                    <div\n                      className=\"px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold truncate\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderBottom: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {user.displayName}\n                    </div>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/profile\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Profile\n                    </Link>\n                    <Link\n                      href=\"/notifications\"\n                      className=\"block px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50\"\n                      onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\n                      style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                    >\n                      Notifications\n                      {notifCount > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {notifCount}\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </Link>\n                    <button\n                      onClick={handleLogout}\n                      className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer\"\n                      role=\"menuitem\"\n                      style={{\n                        borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Sign out\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/login\"\n                className=\"btn-secondary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign in\n              </Link>\n              <Link\n                href=\"/auth/register\"\n                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n                style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n              >\n                Sign up\n              </Link>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Mobile hamburger */}\n        <div className=\"flex sm:hidden items-center gap-2\">\n          {user && notifCount > 0 && (\n            <Link\n              href=\"/notifications\"\n              className=\"badge text-white\"\n              style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\", fontSize: \"0.65rem\" }}\n              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n            >\n              {notifCount}\n            </Link>\n          )}\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}\n            className=\"p-2 cursor-pointer\"\n            aria-label={mobileMenuOpen ? \"Close menu\" : \"Open menu\"}\n            aria-expanded={mobileMenuOpen}\n            style={{ background: \"none\", border: \"none\" }}\n          >\n            {mobileMenuOpen ? (\n              <svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"var(--color-text)\" strokeWidth={2} strokeLinecap=\"round\">\n                <line x1={6} y1={6} x2={18} y2={18} />\n                <line x1={6} y1={18} x2={18} y2={6} />\n              </svg>\n            ) : (\n              <svg width=\"22\" height=\"22\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"var(--color-text)\" strokeWidth={2} strokeLinecap=\"round\">\n                <line x1={3} y1={6} x2={21} y2={6} />\n                <line x1={3} y1={12} x2={21} y2={12} />\n                <line x1={3} y1={18} x2={21} y2={18} />\n              </svg>\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Mobile menu panel */}\n      {mobileMenuOpen && (\n        <div\n          className=\"sm:hidden border-t\"\n          style={{\n            borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n            backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n          }}\n        >\n          <div className=\"px-4 py-3 space-y-1\">\n            {user ? (\n              <>\n                <div\n                  className=\"px-3 py-2 text-sm font-bold flex items-center gap-2\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  <div\n                    className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {user.displayName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                  </div>\n                  {user.displayName}\n                </div>\n                <Link\n                  href=\"/listings/create\"\n                  className=\"block px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-semibold rounded-lg\"\n                  style={{\n                    backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    color: \"white\",\n                    textAlign: \"center\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                  onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  + New Listing\n                </Link>\n                <Link\n                  href=\"/profile\"\n                  className=\"block px-3 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-lg\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\", color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}\n                  onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  Profile\n                </Link>\n                <Link\n                  href=\"/notifications\"\n                  className=\"block px-3 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-lg\"\n                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\", color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}\n                  onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  Notifications\n                  {notifCount > 0 && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge text-white\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {notifCount}\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </Link>\n                <button\n                  onClick={handleLogout}\n                  className=\"w-full text-left px-3 py-2.5 text-sm rounded-lg cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sign out\n                </button>\n              </>\n            ) : (\n              <div className=\"flex gap-3 py-1\">\n                <Link\n                  href=\"/auth/login\"\n                  className=\"btn-secondary text-sm flex-1 text-center\"\n                  style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n                  onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  Sign in\n                </Link>\n                <Link\n                  href=\"/auth/register\"\n                  className=\"btn-primary text-sm flex-1 text-center\"\n                  style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\" }}\n                  onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n                >\n                  Sign up\n                </Link>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </nav>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":31,"oldLines":7,"newStart":31,"newLines":7,"lines":["       .catch(() => {","         // Auth check failed — stay logged out","       });","-  }, []);","+  }, [pathname]);"," ","   // Close menus on outside click","   useEffect(() => {"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_011uAT6MXngh3k2jhcQbUtbr","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012TdryPuqSTDQFnbKHFRgns","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/rate-limit.ts","old_string":"  if (!entry) {\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }","new_string":"  if (!entry) {\n    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack\n    if (store.size > 50_000) {\n      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };\n    }\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":493,"cache_read_input_tokens":51526,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":493},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"7c5e27f0-f5ee-40b1-8429-769a9bb18817"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012TdryPuqSTDQFnbKHFRgns","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/rate-limit.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"199739a4-95b1-4fe0-ba0b-44cb5cc8d302","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:07:55.389Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/rate-limit.ts","oldString":"  if (!entry) {\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }","newString":"  if (!entry) {\n    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack\n    if (store.size > 50_000) {\n      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };\n    }\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }","originalFile":"/**\n * Simple in-memory rate limiter for auth endpoints.\n * Uses a sliding window approach keyed by identifier (IP + route).\n * Not shared across cluster workers — acceptable for SQLite single-process setup.\n */\n\ninterface RateLimitEntry {\n  timestamps: number[];\n}\n\nconst store = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n\n// Clean up expired entries every 5 minutes\n// Guard against multiple intervals on Next.js hot reload\nconst CLEANUP_INTERVAL = 5 * 60 * 1000;\nconst globalObj = globalThis as unknown as { __rateLimitCleanup?: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> };\nif (!globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup) {\n  globalObj.__rateLimitCleanup = setInterval(() => {\n    const now = Date.now();\n    for (const [key, entry] of store) {\n      entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < 15 * 60 * 1000);\n      if (entry.timestamps.length === 0) {\n        store.delete(key);\n      }\n    }\n  }, CLEANUP_INTERVAL);\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if a request should be rate limited.\n * @param key - Unique identifier (e.g., IP + email for login, IP for register)\n * @param maxAttempts - Maximum attempts allowed in the window\n * @param windowMs - Time window in milliseconds (default: 15 minutes)\n * @returns Object with allowed boolean and retryAfter seconds (0 if allowed)\n */\nexport function checkRateLimit(\n  key: string,\n  maxAttempts: number = 5,\n  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000\n): { allowed: boolean; retryAfter: number } {\n  const now = Date.now();\n  let entry = store.get(key);\n\n  if (!entry) {\n    entry = { timestamps: [] };\n    store.set(key, entry);\n  }\n\n  // Remove expired timestamps\n  entry.timestamps = entry.timestamps.filter((t) => now - t < windowMs);\n\n  if (entry.timestamps.length >= maxAttempts) {\n    const oldestInWindow = entry.timestamps[0];\n    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((oldestInWindow + windowMs - now) / 1000);\n    return { allowed: false, retryAfter };\n  }\n\n  entry.timestamps.push(now);\n  return { allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 };\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":42,"oldLines":6,"newStart":42,"newLines":10,"lines":["   let entry = store.get(key);"," ","   if (!entry) {","+    // Prevent unbounded memory growth under attack","+    if (store.size > 50_000) {","+      return { allowed: false, retryAfter: 60 };","+    }","     entry = { timestamps: [] };","     store.set(key, entry);","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BNW9sWvRXcgiyn4zxBZBXS","type":"tool_result","content":"The file successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"11c078e1-7e48-4e4f-8299-8255936d390d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:09:17.416Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listing-detail.test.ts","oldString":"    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (","newString":"    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (","originalFile":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest, parseResponse } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram',\n      discord_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      telegram_chat_id INTEGER,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n        CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n      message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      decided_at TEXT,\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n      comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn(),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn().mockImplementation(async () => {\n    if (!mockSession.userId) return null;\n    return mockSession;\n  }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/notifications\", () => ({\n  createNotification: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/telegram\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/discord\", () => ({\n  isBotConfigured: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false),\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH, DELETE: DELETE_HANDLER } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/[id]/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    max_group_size: number;\n    is_full: number;\n    requires_approval: number;\n    telegram_link: string;\n    discord_link: string;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full, requires_approval, telegram_link, discord_link)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    overrides.max_group_size ?? 5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0,\n    overrides.requires_approval ?? 0,\n    overrides.telegram_link ?? \"\",\n    overrides.discord_link ?? \"\"\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction addMember(listingId: number, userId: number) {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n}\n\nfunction createParams(id: string) {\n  return { params: Promise.resolve({ id }) };\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Invalid listing ID\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\");\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Listing not found\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing details with members\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.listing.book_title).toBe(\"Test Book\");\n    expect(data.listing.author_name).toBe(\"Test User\");\n    expect(data.listing.memberCount).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(false);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(false);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns isMember=true when session user is a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: Record<string, unknown> }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.isMember).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.isAuthor).toBe(true);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for full listing when user is not a member\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const user2 = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = user2;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"This listing is no longer available\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listing for full listing when user is the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { is_full: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows pending applicants to the author\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { pendingApplicants: unknown[] } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.pendingApplicants.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"shows hasApplied status for applicants\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { requires_approval: 1 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const applicant = insertUser(\"applicant@example.com\", \"Applicant\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id, status) VALUES (?, ?, 'pending')\").run(listingId, applicant);\n    mockSession.userId = applicant;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`);\n    const response = await GET(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listing: { hasApplied: boolean; applicationStatus: string } }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listing.hasApplied).toBe(true);\n    expect(data.listing.applicationStatus).toBe(\"pending\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid listing ID\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/abc\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"abc\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to edit\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"Only the author can edit this listing\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has telegram link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates listing fields successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { language: \"French\", meetingFormat: \"voice\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const updated = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT language, meeting_format FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as Record<string, string>;\n    expect(updated.language).toBe(\"French\");\n    expect(updated.meeting_format).toBe(\"voice\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 for invalid meeting format\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { meetingFormat: \"invalid\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when no fields to update\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toBe(\"No fields to update\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"prevents reducing group size below current member count\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { max_group_size: 5 });\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n    const u2 = insertUser(\"u2@test.com\", \"U2\");\n    addMember(listingId, u2);\n    const u3 = insertUser(\"u3@test.com\", \"U3\");\n    addMember(listingId, u3);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { maxGroupSize: \"2\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"Cannot reduce group size\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"DELETE /api/listings/[id]\", () => {\n  let authorId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM ratings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    authorId = insertUser();\n    mockSession.userId = authorId;\n    mockSession.email = \"test@example.com\";\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 403 when non-author tries to delete\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    const otherId = insertUser(\"other@example.com\", \"Other\");\n    mockSession.userId = otherId;\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(403);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when listing has chat link shared\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId, { telegram_link: \"https://t.me/test\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"deletes listing and related data successfully\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(authorId);\n    addMember(listingId, authorId);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(`/api/listings/${listingId}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(String(listingId)));\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.success).toBe(true);\n\n    const listing = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId);\n    expect(listing).toBeUndefined();\n\n    const members = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").all(listingId);\n    expect(members.length).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 404 for non-existent listing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings/999\", { method: \"DELETE\" });\n    const response = await DELETE_HANDLER(req, createParams(\"999\"));\n    const { status } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(404);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":68,"oldLines":6,"newStart":68,"newLines":13,"lines":["       created_at TEXT DEFAULT {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01FgbeA3Tob72hhFkc8ooHcs","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01AxxAgYjBRVRwfbscYVp8BH","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Code review round 10: FK violations, stale notifications, input validation, error UX\" --label \"bug,P1,approved\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Issues Found\n\n1. **Critical — FK violation crash on listing delete**: `pending_telegram_groups` not deleted before listing, causing foreign key constraint error and 500 response\n2. **High — `parseInt(maxGroupSize)` inconsistency**: PATCH handler uses raw value instead of `String(maxGroupSize)` for storage, diverging from validated value\n3. **High — `comment` type not validated in ratings**: Non-string comment values (array, object) pass `.length` check and crash SQLite binding\n4. **High — BookSearch silent failure**: When Open Library API is down, no error message shown to user — just empty results\n5. **High — Stale notification badge**: Navbar notification count fetched once on mount, never refreshed on navigation\n6. **High — Missing unique index on `telegram_chat_id`**: `pending_telegram_groups` table lookup by `telegram_chat_id` does full table scan, allows duplicates\n7. **Medium — Rate limiter unbounded growth**: No size cap on in-memory store; IP rotation attack can cause OOM\n8. **Medium — Author excluded from `group_full` notification**: Author never learns their group is full (only gets `new_member` notification for the last joiner)\nEOF\n)\" 2>&1","description":"Create GitHub issue"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":283,"cache_read_input_tokens":57674,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":283},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"2994732d-1175-47ad-84db-04171b6985cb"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Sha5pGCx4B4muTRD2EcitY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01JLWsV7u2bbhTu4mqk9m5oH","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: FK violation on delete, stale notifications, input validation, error UX (#94)\n\n- Delete pending_telegram_groups before listing to prevent FK constraint crash\n- Use String(maxGroupSize) consistently in PATCH handler storage path\n- Add typeof check for comment field in ratings API\n- Show error message in BookSearch when Open Library API is unavailable\n- Re-fetch notification count on route changes to keep badge current\n- Add unique index on pending_telegram_groups.telegram_chat_id\n- Cap rate limiter store at 50k entries to prevent OOM under attack\n- Include author in group_full notifications (they need to know to create chat)\n- Update test to include pending_telegram_groups table in mock DB\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit code review fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":986,"cache_read_input_tokens":58713,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":986},"output_tokens":47,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"fcfb7a03-2027-45ba-a854-eb55daefe38f"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01N2ggAiVgFwJeNAZox3rRPe","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01G3QoFXNV4GrbErnHjfwU1q","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: code review round 10 — FK violations, stale notifications, error UX\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **Critical**: Fix FK constraint violation crash when deleting a listing with pending Telegram group\n- **High**: Fix `parseInt(maxGroupSize)` inconsistency, add comment type validation in ratings API, show error feedback when Open Library API is down, refresh notification badge on navigation, add unique index on `pending_telegram_groups.telegram_chat_id`\n- **Medium**: Cap rate limiter store size to prevent OOM, include listing author in group_full notifications\n\nCloses #94\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 198 tests pass (including updated delete listing test)\n- [x] Lint clean, build passes\n- [ ] Verify listing deletion works when pending_telegram_groups has data\n- [ ] Verify notification badge updates on navigation\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" 2>&1","description":"Create pull request"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":272,"cache_read_input_tokens":60038,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":272},"output_tokens":70,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"e15f9bdd-07db-422a-a07f-b215cef989fe"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01NfJyBsnhLvRh8pQvbfrXiw","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_019FGSi1mHTncsxLJjRJKWe4","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_08-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-24 08:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 3156s at start, DB connected, homepage renders correctly)\n- **Open Issues**: #54 (PAT expires ~March 27, needs-human — 3 days left), #21 (Telegram bot token, needs-human)\n- **Open PRs**: None at start\n- **All PRD features**: Implemented\n- **All approved issues**: Completed\n- **Previous session (07:00)**: Crashed — left corrupted JSONL session log (cleaned up)\n\n## Work Done\n\n### Cleanup: Fixed corrupted 07:00 session log\n- Previous session crashed during init, leaving raw JSONL stream events as the log\n- Replaced with a proper crash summary\n\n### Code Review Round 10 (#94, PR #95) — merged + deployed\nRan comprehensive code review focusing on previously uncovered areas (memory leaks, data integrity, edge cases, error recovery). Found 8 issues:\n\n1. **Critical — FK violation crash on listing delete**: `pending_telegram_groups` not deleted before listing, causing foreign key constraint error. Fixed by adding DELETE statement before listing removal.\n\n2. **High — `parseInt(maxGroupSize)` inconsistency**: PATCH handler line 230 used `parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10)` directly instead of `parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10)` like the validation block. Fixed to use consistent coercion.\n\n3. **High — Comment type not validated in ratings**: Non-string values (array, object) passed `.length` check. Added `typeof` guard returning 400.\n\n4. **High — BookSearch silent failure**: When Open Library API is down, search returned empty results with no user feedback. Added `searchError` state and error message UI.\n\n5. **High — Stale notification badge**: Navbar fetched notification count once on mount, never refreshed. Changed to re-fetch on `pathname` changes.\n\n6. **High — Missing unique index on `telegram_chat_id`**: Added `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX` to prevent duplicate entries and improve lookup performance.\n\n7. **Medium — Rate limiter unbounded growth**: Added 50k entry cap to prevent OOM under IP rotation attacks.\n\n8. **Medium — Author excluded from `group_full` notification**: Author never received notification that their group filled. Fixed by removing author exclusion from `notifyGroupFull`.\n\n### Test Suite\n- Updated listing-detail test to include `pending_telegram_groups` table in mock DB\n- All 198 tests passing\n\n## Deployment\n- Built and deployed via PM2 restart\n- Production verified healthy at 07:12 UTC (uptime 18s)\n\n## CI\n- PR #95: lint-and-build passed (50s)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining\n2. Check #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. 10 rounds of code review done — consider E2E testing, performance optimization, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":168,"cache_read_input_tokens":62426,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":168},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"7fa22774-1d39-400b-8cff-c88d609fd9d6"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_019FGSi1mHTncsxLJjRJKWe4","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_08-00.md"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"3e46bfc1-1452-4963-9bd1-e4bd3fcd1a8e","uuid":"8e157b89-494b-4a79-87cb-30b9676c06cb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T07:13:10.765Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/sessions/2026-03-24_08-00.md","content":"# Session: 2026-03-24 08:00 UTC\n\n## Triage Summary\n- **Production**: Healthy (uptime 3156s at start, DB connected, homepage renders correctly)\n- **Open Issues**: #54 (PAT expires ~March 27, needs-human — 3 days left), #21 (Telegram bot token, needs-human)\n- **Open PRs**: None at start\n- **All PRD features**: Implemented\n- **All approved issues**: Completed\n- **Previous session (07:00)**: Crashed — left corrupted JSONL session log (cleaned up)\n\n## Work Done\n\n### Cleanup: Fixed corrupted 07:00 session log\n- Previous session crashed during init, leaving raw JSONL stream events as the log\n- Replaced with a proper crash summary\n\n### Code Review Round 10 (#94, PR #95) — merged + deployed\nRan comprehensive code review focusing on previously uncovered areas (memory leaks, data integrity, edge cases, error recovery). Found 8 issues:\n\n1. **Critical — FK violation crash on listing delete**: `pending_telegram_groups` not deleted before listing, causing foreign key constraint error. Fixed by adding DELETE statement before listing removal.\n\n2. **High — `parseInt(maxGroupSize)` inconsistency**: PATCH handler line 230 used `parseInt(maxGroupSize, 10)` directly instead of `parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10)` like the validation block. Fixed to use consistent coercion.\n\n3. **High — Comment type not validated in ratings**: Non-string values (array, object) passed `.length` check. Added `typeof` guard returning 400.\n\n4. **High — BookSearch silent failure**: When Open Library API is down, search returned empty results with no user feedback. Added `searchError` state and error message UI.\n\n5. **High — Stale notification badge**: Navbar fetched notification count once on mount, never refreshed. Changed to re-fetch on `pathname` changes.\n\n6. **High — Missing unique index on `telegram_chat_id`**: Added `CREATE UNIQUE INDEX` to prevent duplicate entries and improve lookup performance.\n\n7. **Medium — Rate limiter unbounded growth**: Added 50k entry cap to prevent OOM under IP rotation attacks.\n\n8. **Medium — Author excluded from `group_full` notification**: Author never received notification that their group filled. Fixed by removing author exclusion from `notifyGroupFull`.\n\n### Test Suite\n- Updated listing-detail test to include `pending_telegram_groups` table in mock DB\n- All 198 tests passing\n\n## Deployment\n- Built and deployed via PM2 restart\n- Production verified healthy at 07:12 UTC (uptime 18s)\n\n## CI\n- PR #95: lint-and-build passed (50s)\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. **URGENT**: PAT expires ~March 27 (#54) — ~3 days remaining\n2. Check #21 for Telegram token response\n3. Check production health\n4. 10 rounds of code review done — consider E2E testing, performance optimization, or new feature proposals\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

pressure) — keep recording sessions short, restart between scenes\n    63→- ffmpeg installed as static binary in ~/bin — add to PATH: export PATH=\"$HOME/bin:$PATH\"\n    64→- ELEVENLABS_API_KEY not available — demo video has no voiceover\n    65→- Demo video at .claude-beat/logs/demos/demo_2026-03-20.mp4 (5 scenes, ~1:51)\n    66→- SQLite DB stored in `app/data/` (gitignored)\n    67→- DB TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var (see issue #21)\n    69→- Discord bot integration requires DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + DISCORD_CLIENT_ID + DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET env vars\n    70→- Listings have `platform_preference` field (telegram/discord)\n    71→- Email notifications require SMTP env vars (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_FROM, etc.)\n    72→- nodemailer added as dependency for email sending\n    73→- Session secret: lazy runtime check (not module-level) to avoid build failure\n    74→- ESLint: use eslint v9 + @eslint/js v9 (not v10) to avoid peer dep conflicts\n    75→- npm ci works cleanly (no --legacy-peer-deps needed)\n    76→- No root/sudo access on server — can't install nginx, Docker, or system packages\n    77→- PM2 available via npx (not globally installed)\n    78→\n    79→## Closed Recently\n- #93: Code review round 9 — client-side race conditions, date bugs, error handling, ARIA — merged + deployed\n- #91: Code review round 8 — timing-safe secrets, type validation, stale
